measurement_note: Size is M, the material-based upper bound on the candidate length. Each workload uses ribbons [4S, S] and k = 4, so M = 5S / 4 while the answer is S. Binary search takes O(N log M) time. A correct descending implementation that tests every candidate until it reaches S completes all tiers and fails only by O(NM) scaling.
